description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: TD appeals to cross boundary travellers to plan ahead their journeys and reserve sufficient commuting time
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 運輸署呼籲過境旅客預早妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間。

2024-04-03T18:00:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department anticipates that more travellers would use land-based Boundary Control Points to travel to / from the Mainland from the Ching Ming Festival tomorrow (4th April) to Sunday (7th April). The Transport Department appeals to these travellers to plan ahead their journeys and reserve sufficient commuting time. The Transport Department has instructed public transport operators to strengthen their services to meet passenger demand.
2024-04-03T18:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署預料由明天清明節假期(4月4日)起至星期日(4月7日)將有較多旅客使用陸路口岸往返內地。運輸署呼籲相關旅客預早妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間。運輸署已指示公共運輸服務營辦商加強服務應付乘客需求。

2024-04-04T14:57:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department anticipates that more travellers would use land-based Boundary Control Points to travel to / from the Mainland from the Ching Ming Festival today (4th April) to Sunday (7th April). The Transport Department appeals to these travellers to plan ahead their journeys and reserve sufficient commuting time. The Transport Department has instructed public transport operators to strengthen their services to meet passenger demand.
2024-04-04T14:57:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署預料由今天清明節假期(4月4日)起至星期日(4月7日)將有較多旅客使用陸路口岸往返內地。運輸署呼籲相關旅客預早妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間。運輸署已指示公共運輸服務營辦商加強服務應付乘客需求。

2024-04-05T06:33:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department anticipates that more travellers would use land-based Boundary Control Points to travel to / from the Mainland from the Ching Ming Festival (4th April) to Sunday (7th April). The Transport Department appeals to these travellers to plan ahead their journeys and reserve sufficient commuting time. The Transport Department has instructed public transport operators to strengthen their services to meet passenger demand.
2024-04-05T06:33:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署預料由清明節假期(4月4日)起至星期日(4月7日)將有較多旅客使用陸路口岸往返內地。運輸署呼籲相關旅客預早妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間。運輸署已指示公共運輸服務營辦商加強服務應付乘客需求。

2024-04-03T18:23:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Po Shek Wu Road (both bounds) near Choi Yuen Estate are closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-03T18:23:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，寶石湖路(來回方向)近彩園邨的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-03T19:20:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , all lanes of Po Shek Wu Road (Fan Kam Road bound) near Choi Yuen Estate are closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. At the same time, part of lanes of Po Shek Wu Road (Jockey Club Road Bound) near Choi Yuen Estate is still closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-03T19:20:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，寶石湖路(往粉錦公路方向)近彩園邨的全線現已封閉。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 同時，寶石湖路(往馬會道方向)近彩園邨的部份行車線仍然封閉。駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-03T19:48:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , all lanes of Po Shek Wu Road (both bounds) near Choi Yuen Estate are closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Citizens please take note services of KMB and LWB travelling via the above road section are affected. Please consider using other public transport services, such as MTR services. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-03T19:48:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，寶石湖路(來回方向)近彩園邨的全線現已封閉。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。市民請留意九巴及龍運巴士途經上述路段的服務會受影響，市民請考慮使用其他公共交通服務，例如港鐵服務。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-03T20:24:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Po Shek Wu Road (both bounds) near Choi Yuen Estate which was closed due to traffic accident are re-opened to all traffic. Citizens please take note services of KMB and LWB travelling via the above road section are affected. Please consider using other public transport services, such as MTR services.
2024-04-03T20:24:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的寶石湖路(來回方向)近彩園邨的部份行車線現已解封。 市民請留意九巴及龍運巴士途經上述路段的服務會受影響，市民請考慮使用其他公共交通服務，例如港鐵服務。

2024-04-03T20:28:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Po Shek Wu Road (both bounds) near Choi Yuen Estate which was closed due to traffic accident are re-opened to all traffic. Service of KMB which was affected by the traffic accident at the above road section has gradually resumed normal.
2024-04-03T20:28:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的寶石湖路(來回方向)近彩園邨的部份行車線現已解封。 較早前因位於上述路段的交通意外而受影響的九巴服務已陸續回復正常。

2024-04-03T19:38:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , all lanes of Fo Tan Road (Fo Tan bound) near Lok King Street are closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.
2024-04-03T19:38:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，火炭路(往火炭方向)近樂景街的全線現已封閉。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。

2024-04-03T19:44:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Fo Tan Road (Fo Tan bound) near Lok King Street is closed to all traffic. Also, vehicles from Fo Tan Road (Fo Tan Bound) should only make right turn onto Lok King Street. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-03T19:44:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，火炭路(往火炭方向)近樂景街的部份行車線現已封閉。 同時，火炭路(往大埔方向)車輛只可右轉入樂景街。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-03T21:03:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Fo Tan Road (Fo Tan bound) near Lok King Street which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-04-03T21:03:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的火炭路(往火炭方向)近樂景街的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-04-03T19:57:00.CONTENT_EN:
Traffic at the following road sections have resumed normal:
– Lantau Link (Kap Shui Mun Bridge) (Kowloon bound)
– Lantau Link (Tsing Ma Bridge) (Kowloon bound).
2024-04-03T19:57:00.CONTENT_CN:
以下路段的交通現已恢復正常:
–青嶼幹線(汲水門大橋)(往九龍方向)
–青嶼幹線(青馬大橋)(往九龍方向)。

2024-04-03T20:18:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Lion Rock Tunnel Road (Tai Po bound) near Worldwide Gardens is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-03T20:18:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，獅子山隧道公路(往大埔方向)近世界花園的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Individual train service has been cancelled

2024-04-03T21:15:00.CONTENT_EN: As informed by Mainland Railway Authorities, High Speed Rail train G5614 travelling from Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shenzhenbei has been cancelled due to train service regulations. Ticket refunds should be obtained within 30 days. Please use the 12306 official website (12306. cn) and app or at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2024-04-03T21:15:00.CONTENT_CN: 內地鐵路單位通報，由於車務調度，由香港西九龍站前往深圳北的高速鐵路列車車次G5614取消。 您可在30天內於12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式，或到香港西九龍站辦理退票。

2024-04-03T22:20:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to emergency repairing works , the slow lane of Tsuen Wan Road (Tuen Mun bound) near Lai King Estate is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-03T22:20:00.CONTENT_CN: 因緊急維修，荃灣路(往屯門方向)近荔景邨的慢線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-04T02:20:00.CONTENT_EN: The slow lane of Tsuen Wan Road (Tuen Mun bound) near Lai King Estate which was closed due to emergency repairing works is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-04-04T02:20:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因緊急維修而封閉的荃灣路(往屯門方向)近荔景邨的慢線現已解封。

2024-04-04T08:30:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to rail defect near Tsim Sha Tsui Station, Tsuen Wan Line trains will operate at a slower speed from Jordan Station to Tsim Sha Tsui Station. This could extend the total journey time on the Tsuen Wan Line between Central Station and Tsuen Wan Station by 15-20 minutes.
2024-04-04T08:30:00.CONTENT_CN: 由於尖沙咀站附近的路軌出現故障，荃灣綫列車駛經佐敦站至尖沙咀站路段時需要慢駛，荃灣綫來往中環站及荃灣站的行車時間預計需要額外15-20分鐘。

2024-04-04T11:37:00.CONTENT_EN:
The temporary repair work on the rail defect near Tsim Sha Tsui Station this morning has been finished. However, Tsuen Wan Line trains is still operating at a slower speed from Jordan Station to Tsim Sha Tsui Station. This could extend the total journey time on the Tsuen Wan Line between Central Station and Tsuen Wan Station by 3-5 minutes throughout the operating hours today. Please click on the "Alternative Transport Information" below to search for other routes. Longer waiting times on Tsuen Wan Line platforms can be expected. 
Please allow more time for travel.
2024-04-04T11:37:00.CONTENT_CN:
今早尖沙咀站附近路軌故障已經臨時復修。 荃灣綫列車駛經佐敦站至尖沙咀站路段時仍需要慢駛，預計今日荃灣綫來往中環站及荃灣站的整體行車時間需要額外3-5分鐘。 請按以下「其他交通工具資料」連結搜尋替代路綫。 現時荃灣綫月台上的乘客較多，候車時間亦會較長。 
請為行程預留充裕時間。

2024-04-04T10:55:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , the fast lane of Fanling Highway (Kowloon bound) near Jockey Club Road is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-04T10:55:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，粉嶺公路(往九龍方向)近馬會道的快線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-04T16:02:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain emergency works , the slow lane of Pak Tai Street (Mok Cheong Street bound) near Ma Tau Kok Road is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Vehicles exceeding 7 metres making right turning from Ma Tau Kok Road onto Pak Tai Street are also prohibited. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-04T16:02:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管緊急維修，北帝街(往木廠街方向)近馬頭角道的慢線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 七米以下的車輛亦禁止由馬頭角道右轉入北帝街。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-06T13:45:00.CONTENT_EN: The slow lane of Pak Tai Street (Mok Cheong Street bound) near Ma Tau Kok Road which was closed due to watermain emergency works is re-opened to all traffic.

2024-04-04T18:08:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Yuen Long Highway (Tuen Mun bound) near Pok Oi Hospital is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-04T18:08:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，元朗公路(往屯門方向)近博愛醫院的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-04T18:48:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的元朗公路(往屯門方向)近博愛醫院的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-04-05T01:54:00.CONTENT_EN: Tsuen Wan Line train service has already ended for today. Repair work will continue overnight. Tomorrow’s train service arrangements will be announced later based on the progress of work. Thank you for your patience and understanding.
2024-04-05T01:54:00.CONTENT_CN: 今天的荃灣綫服務已經完結。港鐵職員會繼續於非行車時段進行復修。 我們會視乎復修進度盡快通知大家早上的列車服務安排。 感謝您的體諒。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Kwun Tong Line Extra Journey Time
